questions.question: What is the critical gotcha when using `withDefaults` with array or object props?
options: Arrays and objects cannot be used as prop defaults at all
Mutable defaults must use factory functions or all instances share the same reference
Object defaults must be declared outside the component
Arrays must be typed as `readonly` to work as defaults

questions.question: Which primitive types do NOT need factory functions in `withDefaults`?
options: All types need factory functions for safety
Strings, numbers, booleans, and null — they are immutable values

questions.question: What Vue 3.5+ feature makes `withDefaults` and factory functions unnecessary?
options: Reactive props destructuring with default values in `defineProps`
